description.value: Your shell is etched with markings that grant you a connection with the underlying truth of the cosmos. Choose one cantrip from the divine spell list. You can cast this cantrip as a divine innate spell at will. You can also cast the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Implant Data] cantrip as a divine innate spell at will, except when you do, the target becomes "your shell," and data implanted on your shell can be accessed by any creature that knows the G'folian language. A cantrip is heightened to a spell rank equal to half your level rounded up.
